feed.title: SAP Community - ABAP Cloud
feed.subtitle: ABAP Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: sap Cloud authorization Object problem because of namespace to long /asdfghjk/
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

We are working in ABAP Cloud and created a custom namespace with 8 characters:

/asdfghjk/
(10 characters total including the slashes)

We already have thousands of CDS views and other objects created under this namespace.

At the final stage of a complex development, we now need to implement CDS Access Control .
For this, we need to create 4 authorization objects and reference them in CDS access controls.

Problem

Authorization object names are limited to 10 characters, and our namespace alone already consumes all 10 characters:

/asdfghjk/

Because of this:

  • We cannot create authorization objects in this namespace (no space left for a name).

  • CDS Access Controls under /asdfghjk/ can only reference authorization objects from the same namespace.

What we tried

  1. Create a shorter namespace /abc/

    • ✔ We can create authorization objects

    • ❌ We cannot use them in CDS Access Controls under /asdfghjk/ because namespaces differ

  2. Create Z authorization objects*

    • ❌ Same issue: CDS Access Controls in /asdfghjk/ can only reference objects from /asdfghjk/

Constraint

We cannot move all existing objects from /asdfghjk/ to a shorter namespace — this would involve thousands of objects and is not feasible.

Question

Is there any recommended solution or workaround for this situation in ABAP Cloud?

  • Is there a way to reference authorization objects from a different namespace in CDS Access Control?

  • Is there an SAP-recommended approach for long namespaces and authorization objects?

  • Or is this a known limitation with a documented workaround?

Any guidance or best practice would be highly appreciated.

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: XCO_CP_XLSX Currency/Quantity Formatting
entry.content:
Is it possible to apply Currency/Quantity/Domain(Conversion Exit) formatting, while writing to an Excel file using XCO_CP_XLSX?

PS: Not looking for this answer: Convert all fields to Strings.

Whoever has SAP S-User-ID, please vote here to have this feature included in XCO_CP_XLSX:

https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/364375

entry.title: Frontend Error: Value '00000000' violates facet information 'nullable=false'
entry.content:
Type Frontend Error
Short Text Value '00000000' violates facet information 'nullable=false

We have an unmanaged entity in RAP where one key field is of type date which even if date is populated, we face the below error.
Value '00000000' violates facet information 'nullable=false'.

Request @Pa_Vi to solve this bug, since similar issue was reported by user 4 years ago still no solution was suggested

Similar question asked in 2022 still no answer

ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model  ABAP Development ABAP Development SAP Quality Issue Management SAP BTP ABAP environment

entry.title: JSON Payload Download Implementation in RAP Application
entry.content:
Hello Expert,

I am currently working on a custom RAP (RESTful ABAP Programming Model) Application in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud. In this application, we use an API to send data to an external portal.

Now there is a new requirement when the user clicks a button, the JSON payload that is used in the ABAP program for sending data via the API should be downloaded in JSON format.

For this purpose, I have already created a custom action in the Behavior Definition, and the button is visible in the Application. My question is how to implement the download functionality so that the same JSON payload used for the API call can be downloaded by the user in JSON format and Also, please explain how to implement the JSON download functionality in the RAP application with step by step guidance.

Thank you,

entry.title: Business Context to Outgoing Checks (FIN_FO_PAYM_CHECK_US)
entry.content:
Hi,

I have a request to add some custom fields when create a check, but I'm unable to find a Business Context for both custom fields and custom logic.

Form: FIN_FO_PAYM_CHECK_US

Data Source: FDP_FFO_PAYM_CHECK_SRV

Apps: Manage Automatic Payments, Manage Outgoing checks

Is it available at all?

entry.title: SAP Build (no-code app development)
entry.content: Hello, I am Ehsan, came to know about SAP Build. Got some questions.

entry.title: How to properly use BAdI SD_SLS_DATA_TRANSFER_HEAD?
entry.content:
I am trying to implement this BAdI SD_SLS_DATA_TRANSFER_HEAD in Eclipse. However, a filter combination is needed and I'm not sure about the Enhancement_ID. Any tips? I tried to put the BAdI implementation name that I have created. But when testing, this Enhancement Spot for SD_SLS_DATA_TRANSFER_HEAD was not triggered in the debugger.

 

Enhancement_ID needed:

 

Tried to follow this blog posthttps://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blog-posts-by-sap/cloud-badi-to-influence-sales-document-copy-control/ba-p/14208566 . However, the mentioned BAdI SD_SLS_COPY_RQMNT_HEAD_SLS is not present in CFL app on my side.

entry.title: While creating QN attachment in API I am getting the authorization error
entry.content:
I have successfully posted the Quality Notification via API IN PUBLIC CLOUD. After creation while trying to create an attachment in Quality Notification using API /sap/opu/odata/sap/API_CV_ATTACHMENT_SRV/AttachmentContentSet, I am getting authorization error. I have used the system credentials SAP_COM_0153 (which is used for QN).

Kindly help me in resolving this issue

entry.title: RAP‑Based Service Does Not Support Aggregation Totals with Filters and Group‑By
entry.content:
We are implementing a Fiori Elements List Report using a RAP‑based OData service (OData V2 or V4).
The business requirement is to show aggregated totals (SUM) for multiple numeric columns. These totals must update dynamically whenever:

  • Filters are applied
  • Group By is enabled
  • Group levels expand/collapse
  • Sorting or table personalization is applied

    Most Important Requirement:

    When the List Report table is grouped, the system must display an aggregation subtotal row for each group (group-level total), not only a grand total.

    However, RAP currently does not allow analytical annotations or analytical CDS entities to be used with transactional behavior. Because of this limitation:

    • We cannot enable annotations such as
      • @analytical.query: true
      • @DefaultAggregation: #SUM
      • @Aggregation.default: #SUM
      • RAP services cannot perform backend aggregations or expose group-level totals.
      • As a result, neither grand totals nor group-level totals can appear in the List Report.

entry.title: PATCH operation failed on API_SALES_ORDER_SRV
entry.content:
Hello Team,

I am going to update two fields one from header i.e "PurchaseOrderByCustomer"  and another from Item "RequestedQuantity".
These two fields available in A_SalesOrderItem EntitySet. But when I am doing PATCH operation only "RequestedQuantity" is updating not "PurchaseOrderByCustomer". 

I am using  url 
/sap/opu/odata/sap/API_SALES_ORDER_SRV/A_SalesOrderItem(SalesOrder='7000000223',SalesOrderItem='0010')

{

    "PurchaseOrderByCustomer": "Alex",

    "RequestedQuantity": "20"

}

Is it not possible to update header field from item ? Is $batch operation work on this API ?

Can you please help me on this?

entry.title: Different Header in XML schema based interface with gateway in sap s4 hana ADOBE forms
entry.content:
Hi

I am using Master form template to display logo and fotter and content form template for content my requirement is to have 2 different header fields in first page and second page. i.e after logo i want 5 fields in first page and 2 fields in second page and so on.  Could you let me know how to achieve different headers using XML schema based interface in sap s4 hana 

Thanks

entry.title: ADT Code Completion is (Still) Slow
entry.content:
Hello all,

as mentioned in a previous Q&A which was not answered, ADT code completion is still unusably slow.

When typing in SE38 with my normal typing speed, I can eaily get code completions when pressing tab:

https://streamable.com/6muhg2 

However, when typing with the same speed in eclipse I am always too fast for the code completion, as it takes roughly twice as long to show compared to SE38

https://streamable.com/l3lltf

So in Eclipse I would need to actively wait:

https://streamable.com/dt3oil

Which is simply unacceptable. This needs to be fixed ASAP.

entry.title: issue VSCODE connect to ABAP on BTP
entry.content:
Hi Guys, we have an abap system on BTP, its okay the connection to develop Fiori apps using BAS

We are facing issues to develop locallly using VSCODE, i have error 401 when im trying to add Sap System abap on BTP:

Okay, its authorization issue, but i dont have place to import service key here.

Any Idea how to solve it?

entry.title: SAP BTP subaccount D81 credentials are not working
entry.content: I’m having issues with one of your courses. In the course: Acquiring Core ABAP Skills: https://share.percipio.com/cd/rmOuj6COt, first section: Preparing the Development Environment. There's a Demo with the step-by-step how to Create an ABAP Cloud Project (logon to the SAP BTP ABAP Environment), and credentials were provided to logon to SAP BTP subaccount D81 (user: TRAIN-00 password: welcome) but these credentials are not working for me, I tried accessing in an incognito window and also deleting cache but still not working.

entry.title: custom field value is not updating in "Manage sales order" Fiori app
entry.content:
Hello Team,

I am using SAP S4 hana 2023 on-prem system. I have created one custom filed "Comments" in standard Fiori app "Manage Sales Order version 2" using custom field Fiori app.
Now my requirement is when user will update value in "Comments" field of 1st line item, then same value will be update in "Comments" field of second line item.

I have tried with Badi SD_SLS_MODIFY_ITEM, but its only updating 1st line item, not 2nd one.

I have also tried with extend BDEF I_SALESORDERTP, but in R_SalesOrderItemTP is not allowing to add determination on custom filed "Comments".


Can you please help me on this how to solve ?

 

Thanks

entry.title: Creating Number Range Objects in SAP BTP Trial Account?
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I’m currently working in an SAP BTP Trial Account and I need to create and manage Number Range Objects for my application.

In on-premise SAP systems (like S/4HANA or ECC), we typically use transactions such as SNRO to create number range objects. However, I’m unsure how this is handled in the SAP BTP Trial environment.

Specifically, I would like to understand:

  • Is it possible to create Number Range Objects directly in SAP BTP Trial?

  • Are there any trial account limitations?

     

    Any guidance, documentation links, or examples would be greatly appreciated.

    Thanks in advance for your support.

entry.title: Issue with Updating Operation wise Confirmation Time via RAP Application
entry.content:
Hello Expert,

I am currently working on an SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud RAP application where we have implemented a custom field called “Execution Time” as per the business requirement.

The requirement is to update the execution time operation wise in the standard transaction CO03. For this purpose, we are using EML with I_ProductionOrderConfirmationTP to update the fields OpConfirmedWorkQuantity1 and OpConfirmedWorkQuantity2, which are intended to store the time values.

We have written the necessary logic to update both quantity and time using the same EML statement. However, the changes are not getting reflected as expected in the system.

For your reference, we have also attached a snapshot of the Time field along with the relevant code.

Could you please review and suggest if there is an alternative approach or any correction required to achieve the desired update?

Best Regards,

Thank you,

READ ENTITIES OF i_productionordconfirmationtp
ENTITY productionorderconfirmation
EXECUTE getconfproposal
FROM VALUE #(( confirmationgroup = lv_opconf
             %param-confirmationyieldquantity = <lfs_childbillet>-totalweight
            ) )
        RESULT DATA(lt_confproposal)
        REPORTED DATA(lt_reported_conf).

LOOP AT lt_confproposal ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<ls_confproposal>).
APPEND INITIAL LINE TO lt_confirmation ASSIGNING FIELD SYMBOL(<ls_confirmation>).
       <ls_confirmation>-%cid = 'Conf' && sy-tabix.
       <ls_confirmation>-%data = CORRESPONDING #( <ls_confproposal>-%param ).
       <ls_confirmation>-%data-ConfirmedExecutionStartTime = lv_start_ts.
       <ls_confirmation>-%data-ConfirmedExecutionEndTime   = lv_end_ts.
       <ls_confirmation>-%data-finalconfirmationtype = 'X'.

 READ ENTITIES OF i_productionordconfirmationtp
      ENTITY productionorderconfirmation
      EXECUTE getgdsmvtproposal
FROM VALUE #( ( confirmationgroup = <ls_confproposal>-confirmationgroup
            %param-confirmationyieldquantity =  <lfs_childbillet>-totalweight
            ) )
      RESULT DATA(lt_gdsmvtproposal)
      REPORTED DATA(lt_reported_gdsmvt).
      CHECK lt_gdsmvtproposal[] IS NOT INITIAL.
      CLEAR lt_target[].
      DELETE lt_gdsmvtproposal[] WHERE %param-quantityinentryunit IS INITIAL.

        LOOP AT lt_gdsmvtproposal ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<ls_gdsmvtproposal>)
        WHERE confirmationgroup = <ls_confproposal>-confirmationgroup .
        APPEND INITIAL LINE TO lt_target ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<ls_target>).
       
        <ls_target> = CORRESPONDING #( <ls_gdsmvtproposal>-%param ).
        <ls_target>-%cid = 'Item' && sy-tabix.
        ENDLOOP.

  APPEND VALUE #( %cid_ref = <ls_confirmation>-%cid
                  %target = lt_target
  confirmationgroup = <ls_confproposal>-confirmationgroup ) TO lt_matldocitm.

      ENDLOOP.

      MODIFY ENTITIES OF i_productionordconfirmationtp
      ENTITY productionorderconfirmation
      CREATE FROM lt_confirmation
      CREATE BY \_prodnordconfmatldocitm FROM lt_matldocitm
      MAPPED DATA(poconfirmmapped)
      FAILED DATA(poconfirmfailed)
      REPORTED DATA(poconfirmreported).

    ENDIF.

entry.title: Develop custom report in SAP S/4 HANA public cloud
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I am currently working with SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Version 2602.0.59 and would like to develop a custom report within the system. Could you please guide me on the required steps to achieve this?

Any insights, best practices, or resources on how to approach this task in SAP S/4HANA Cloud would be greatly appreciated.

Looking forward to your responses!

Best regards,
Harshita

entry.title: GOS Attachment in RAP Object Page
entry.content:
I have a requirement to display attachments, attached to GOS in Purchase Order Business Object.

Need to retrieve attachments from GOS and display in RAP application and have a clickable link which will display or download the attachment.

Is it possible or not using RAP managed or Unmanaged?

entry.title: S/4HANA Public Cloud Adobe Forms: How to Control Line Item Layout Using a Header Flag?
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am working on an SAP Adobe Form in S/4HANA Public Cloud. A custom header-level flag field is sent from ABAP and correctly bound to a header field, and the value prints correctly in the PDF output. This flag is used in JavaScript (calculate event) on a repeating line-item subform to control line-item layout behaviour such as visibility or page breaks, based on the current line-item index. The script is placed on a subform.

The logic works correctly in Adobe LiveCycle Designer (ADLC) preview, but after uploading the form and executing it in SAP runtime via transaction code, the conditions do not work. The flag value is available and prints correctly, no JavaScript errors occur, but the line-item layout changes are ignored.

What is the correct SAP-supported way to control line-item layout based on a header-level flag in Adobe Forms in S/4HANA Public Cloud?

 

Thank you.
